identity.name: Stripe
identity.oneLiner: Financial infrastructure to grow your revenue: payments, billing, marketplaces, and fraud prevention.

sources.quote: Financial infrastructure to grow your revenue. Accept payments, offer financial services, and implement custom revenue models—from your first transaction to your billionth.

entities.name: Stripe
entities.description: Financial infrastructure to grow revenue: accept payments, offer financial services, and implement custom revenue models.

sources.quote: Financial infrastructure to grow your revenue. Accept payments, offer financial services, and implement custom revenue models—from your first transaction to your billionth.
50% of Fortune 100 companies have used Stripe to grow their businesses

entities.name: Stripe Payments
entities.description: Integrate a Stripe product to accept payments online and in person, embed financial services, and power custom revenue models.

sources.quote: Integrate a Stripe product to start accepting payments online and in person, embed financial services, power custom revenue models, and more.

entities.name: Stripe Billing
entities.description: Modern monetization infrastructure and the only billing software with a built-in payment system.

sources.quote: Stripe Billing is modern monetization infrastructure. It's the only billing software with a built-in payment system, and is used by fast-scaling businesses like OpenAI, Atlassian, and Figma.
Monetize faster with Stripe Billing. Manage pricing, reduce churn, and grow revenue—on one platform.

entities.name: Stripe Connect
entities.description: The market leader for platform and marketplace payments, enabling platforms to onboard, verify, and pay out users at scale.

sources.quote: The market leader for platform and marketplace payments
Onboard, verify, and pay out your users at scale—whether you run an on-demand, retail, or crowdfunding marketplace.

entities.name: Stripe Radar
entities.description: Fraud prevention that identifies and blocks fraud in real time with AI trained on over $1 trillion in annual payment volume.

sources.quote: Fight fraud with the strength of the Stripe network
Identify and prevent fraud in real time with AI trained on over $1 trillion in annual payment volume.

entities.name: Stripe API
entities.description: A REST API with predictable resource-oriented URLs that accepts form-encoded requests and returns JSON-encoded responses.

sources.quote: The Stripe API is organized around REST. Our API has predictable resource-oriented URLs, accepts form-encoded request bodies, returns JSON-encoded responses

entities.name: Stripe Checkout
entities.description: A Stripe-hosted payment page or embeddable payment form for accepting online payments.

sources.quote: Use Checkout to set up a Stripe-hosted page, embed a payment form, or embed components.

entities.name: Payment Links
entities.description: Create a custom payment page to accept payments without writing code.

sources.quote: Use Payment Links to create a custom page without code.

entities.name: Stripe Elements
entities.description: Embeddable web and in-app UI components for building custom payment forms.

sources.quote: Web Elements
In-app Elements

entities.name: Payment methods
entities.description: The types of payment methods a Stripe integration can support, including dynamic ordering and display.

sources.quote: Learn about the types of payment methods that your Stripe integration can support.
Dynamically order and display payment methods.

entities.name: Platforms and marketplaces
entities.description: On-demand, retail, and crowdfunding marketplaces that onboard, verify, and pay out users via Connect.

sources.quote: Onboard, verify, and pay out your users at scale—whether you run an on-demand, retail, or crowdfunding marketplace.

entities.name: Subscriptions
entities.description: Manage recurring revenue, reduce churn, and build the right pricing model within Stripe Billing.

sources.quote: Manage recurring revenue, reduce churn, and build the right pricing model—however and wherever you do business.

more than $1.9 trillion in payments each year
50% of Fortune 100 companies have used Stripe to grow their businesses
99.999% uptime in 2025
$8.2B in failed payments recovered in 2025
16,000+ Platforms and marketplaces actively using Connect
Radar's AI scans every payment and account using hundreds of signals from across the Stripe network to help detect and prevent fraud before it hits your business, reducing fraud by 32% on average.

questions.question: What is Stripe?
questions.answer: Stripe is financial infrastructure to grow your revenue, letting businesses accept payments, offer financial services, and implement custom revenue models from their first transaction to their billionth.

sources.quote: Financial infrastructure to grow your revenue. Accept payments, offer financial services, and implement custom revenue models—from your first transaction to your billionth.

questions.question: How does the Stripe API work?
questions.answer: The Stripe API is organized around REST with predictable resource-oriented URLs, accepts form-encoded request bodies, and returns JSON-encoded responses using standard HTTP verbs and codes.

sources.quote: The Stripe API is organized around REST. Our API has predictable resource-oriented URLs, accepts form-encoded request bodies, returns JSON-encoded responses

questions.question: How do I start accepting online payments with Stripe?
questions.answer: You can use Payment Links to create a custom page without code, or use Checkout to set up a Stripe-hosted page, embed a payment form, or embed components.

sources.quote: Use Checkout to set up a Stripe-hosted page, embed a payment form, or embed components.
Use Payment Links to create a custom page without code.

questions.question: What makes Stripe Billing different?
questions.answer: Stripe Billing is the only billing software with a built-in payment system, and is used by fast-scaling businesses like OpenAI, Atlassian, and Figma.

sources.quote: It's the only billing software with a built-in payment system, and is used by fast-scaling businesses like OpenAI, Atlassian, and Figma.

questions.question: How does Stripe prevent fraud?
questions.answer: Stripe Radar identifies and prevents fraud in real time with AI trained on over $1 trillion in annual payment volume, assigning risk scores to every payment and automatically blocking high-risk ones.

sources.quote: Identify and prevent fraud in real time with AI trained on over $1 trillion in annual payment volume.
Radar assigns risk scores to every payment and automatically blocks high-risk payments.

questions.question: Who uses Stripe Connect?
questions.answer: Connect is the market leader for platform and marketplace payments, used by 16,000+ platforms and marketplaces to onboard, verify, and pay out users at scale.

sources.quote: The market leader for platform and marketplace payments
16,000+ Platforms and marketplaces actively using Connect

questions.question: How reliable and large-scale is Stripe?
questions.answer: Stripe reports 99.999% uptime in 2025 and processes more than $1.9 trillion in payments each year.

sources.quote: 99.999% uptime in 2025
more than $1.9 trillion in payments each year

questions.question: What tools does Stripe offer to build payment forms?
questions.answer: Stripe provides Web Elements and in-app Elements as embeddable UI components, plus Checkout for hosted or embedded payment pages.

sources.quote: In-app Elements
Use Checkout to set up a Stripe-hosted page, embed a payment form, or embed components.
